questions.question: Describe the key differences between playing audio and video in Android. How do they differ in terms of handling and processing resources?
questions.hint: Provide a detailed explanation of the differences

questions.question: How can you use the TextToSpeech API to convert text into speech in an Android app? What are the different options available for customizing the speech output?
questions.hint: Explain the TextToSpeech API and customization options

questions.question: What is the role of the MediaPlayer class in playing audio and video in Android? Can you provide an example of how to use the MediaPlayer class to play a local audio file?
questions.hint: Explain the MediaPlayer class and provide an example
